data.name: shield/counter_position_desc
data.value: Five Selectable Positions For Zombie Counter

data.name: shield/counter_onlyzmb
data.value: Zombie Counter: Show only remaining zombies

data.name: shield/directed_mode_desc
data.value: Guides you through the main quest step by step, with on-screen instructions and markers (Similar to BO6/7's, Only supports VOD/IX/BOTD)

data.name: shield/directed_mode_roundcap_desc
data.value: Enables Round Cap in Directed Mode, that will increase as you progress through the main quest.

data.name: shield/ee_alwaysenabled_desc
data.value: Always enable's Main Quest, even with custom mutations and other gamemodes

data.name: shield/gameover_options_desc
data.value: Enables fast festart button in gameover screen

data.name: shield/bankmoney_desc
data.value: Enables Bank Mod, at random locations for every map, same as BO2's tranzit

data.name: shield/dropweapons_desc
data.value: Enables dropping weapons for Co-op, by holding ([{+activate}]) and (Aim)

data.name: shield/lobbyalwaysjoinable_desc
data.value: Makes lobby is always joinable in-game, anyone can join

data.name: shield/superrealistic_desc
data.value: Enables super realistic, 1HP mode, no armor allowed, and super sprint zombies on round 1

data.name: shield/classic_slide_desc
data.value: Adds classic sliding from BO3, you can slide infinitely.

data.name: shield/allweapons_in_box_desc
data.value: Makes every weapon in box, such as wonder weapons, grenades and some unused weapons

data.name: shield/boxpatch_desc
data.value: Allows you to change the box weapons you get in Pause Menu.

data.name: shield/shield_publicpause_desc
data.value: Makes you able to pause the game in public lobbies, by holding (Melee) and (Aim)

data.name: shield/damagepoints_desc
data.value: Makes your health points instead of normal health, If you get damaged, you lose points

data.name: shield/RoundColor_desc
data.value: Changes round color for Alternative HUD

data.name: shield/ShowTimer_desc
data.value: Shows a Timer that will be displayed in top right

data.name: shield/rampage_desc
data.value: Same as BO6's, it will disable zombie spawn delays so they spawn instantly and no round delays at all

data.name: shield/perka_desc
data.value: This will remove the extra perks limit (will be 17 with all) instead of it normally being 6 (or 10 with all)

data.name: shield/superperk_desc
data.value: It will make all active perks modifiers (4th slot mod) always ON, but you need to have them first!

data.name: shield/variators_desc
data.value: a Set of Challenges will be selected at the start of the game, (Note: will bug if you use fast_restart!!!)

data.name: shield/classicmode_desc
data.value: Will change HUDs and gameplay a lot to make it style like bo1/2/3

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_desc
data.value: Complete a hardcore version of a boss fight (any map)

data.name: shield/attachmentslimit_desc
data.value: Removes the attachment limit for all weapons (early and might not really work, maybe future update will improve it)

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_blood_desc
data.value: Complete the hardcore version of Blood of the Dead's boss fight

data.name: shield/enh_achv_cranked_ee_desc
data.value: Complete any map's main quest with Team Cranked on

data.name: shield/enh_achv_classic_round50_desc
data.value: Reach round 50 with Classic Mode on

data.name: shield/custom_vos_desc
data.value: Changes the Powerups voice Announcer, can turn on mutliple ones and its going to be random.

data.name: shield/enh_achv_many_players
data.value: there is too many of them

data.name: shield/enh_achv_many_players_desc
data.value: Reach round 20 with 5 or more players in the game

data.name: shield/enh_achv_classic_round100_desc
data.value: Reach round 100 with Classic Mode on

data.name: shield/enh_achv_all_hardcore_desc
data.value: Complete EVERY hardcore version of a boss fight (ALL CURRENTLY SUPPORTED MAPS)

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_eye_desc
data.value: Defeat Eye of Dispair (Hardcore version of voyage of despair boss fight)

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_ae_desc
data.value: Complete the hardcore version of Ancient Evil's boss fight

data.name: shield/enh_achv_classic_ee_desc
data.value: Complete any map's main quest with Classic Mode on

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_eleph_desc
data.value: Complete the hardcore version of IX's boss fight

data.name: shield/classicmode_gums_desc
data.value: Similar to BO3's, Enables an Elixir machine that gives you random Elixir for 500 Points

data.name: shield/bankdep
data.value:
^3 Press ^1[{+activate}] ^3to ^4Deposit [&&2] ^6(Current Bank Money: &&1)
^5(Hold Aim or Fire to Switch Points) (Hold Melee to Switch Modes)

data.name: shield/bankwid
data.value:
^3 Press ^1[{+activate}] ^3to ^2Withdraw [&&2] ^6(Current Bank Money: &&1)
^5(Hold Aim or Fire to Switch Points) (Hold Melee to Switch Modes)

data.name: shield/banknotenough
data.value:
^3 Not Enough Money! [&&1] (Bank)
^2(Hold Melee to Switch Modes)

data.name: shield/playernotenough
data.value:
^3 Not Enough Money! [&&1] (Player)
^2(Hold Melee to Switch Modes)

data.name: shield/saved
data.value: ^3Saved Game! (Note: Continue the game for at least 3 seconds to save)

data.name: shield/movie_disable_desc
data.value: Disables the starting movie cutscene in solo play only

data.name: shield/gum_machine
data.value: Press [{+activate}] to Buy a Random Elixir [Cost: &&1]

data.name: shield/gum_get
data.value: Press [{+activate}] For &&1, and hold [{+switchseat}] to Activate it!

data.name: shield/wonderfizz_buy
data.value: Press [{+activate}] to Buy a Random Perk [Cost: &&1]

data.name: shield/power_need
data.value: You need to turn on the Power first!

data.name: shield/perk_limit
data.value: You have exceeded the Perk limit!

data.name: shield/lui_debug_desc
data.value: Enables Debug Stuff for UI (only host - press F9 for small mod menu)

data.name: shield/zmbbars_desc
data.value: Enables zombies health bars displayed on top of them.

data.name: shield/hardcore_bosses_desc
data.value: Makes the main quest's boss fights a lot harder

data.name: shield/practice_bosses_desc
data.value: Enables practice mode for boss fights, with the ability to choose weapons you want and perks

data.name: shield/second_grenade_desc
data.value: Allows having a Secondary Equipment slot (Example: Having monkey bombs with frag grenades at the same time)

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_tag_desc
data.value: Defeat The Agarthan Device (Hardcore version of tag der toten boss fight)

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_ao_desc
data.value: Complete the hardcore version of Alpha Omega's boss fight

data.name: shield/enh_achv_hardcore_dotn_desc
data.value: Complete the hardcore version of Dead of the Night's boss fight

data.name: shield/team_cranked_desc
data.value: Kill a Zombie to start your Cranked Timer and keep it ticking with each Zombie elimination. Fail to get a kill before the timer expires and BOOM - you're fucking dead (self revives will not work at all). Timer duration decreases as the rounds progress.

data.name: shield/team_cranked_desc_ingame
data.value: Start your Cranked Timer and keep it ticking with each Zombie elimination. Timer duration decreases as the rounds progress.

data.name: shield/directed_mode_desc_ingame
data.value: Follow the Directed Mode instructions and markers to finish the Main Quest.

data.name: shield/five_early_ee_desc
data.value: Changes the requirement to finish Classified's main quest to round 60 instead of round 150.

data.name: shield/tips_chat_desc
data.value: Shows tips in chat when you start a new game. (only host can toggle it)

data.name: shield/powerups_timer_desc
data.value: Shows a timer for the duration of power ups.

data.name: shield/tips_chat_desc
data.value: Shows tips in chat when you start a new game. (only host can toggle it)

data.name: shield/zmbdamage_desc
data.value: Displays the damage you deal to zombies.

data.name: shield/zmbdamage_font_desc
data.value: Changes the damage numbers font style.

data.name: shield/loading_custom_screen_desc
data.value: Changes the Loading Screen to something.

data.name: shield/double_tab_toggle_desc
data.value: Changes Double Tap perk to be 2.0 instead of 1.0. (faster fire rate and double damage)

data.name: shield/classic_loadouts_desc
data.value: Removes Weapon, Equipment, Specialists, Elixir and Perk selection. (if disabled, Specialists are still not affected..)

data.name: shield/jugg_string_desc
data.value: Take 6 hits before going down instead of it normally being 3.

data.name: shield/vulture_string_desc
data.value: Lets you see perk/weapons/pap/etc behind walls, with also having a chance to drop bonus points and ammo on zombie kills, and a chance for a mist that heals you overtime

data.name: shield/elemental_string_desc
data.value: Random chance to trigger a random aat on every bullet that hits any zombie.

data.name: shield/doubletab_string_desc
data.value: Doubles your bullets and gives a faster fire rate speed, Depending on your classic settings, its either 1.0 or 2.0 version.

data.name: shield/doubletab_string_desc2
data.value: Doubles your bullets and gives a faster fire rate speed.

data.name: shield/whoswho_string_desc
data.value: When you go down, instead of dying, you will be teleported to the spawn room with a weapon depending on current round with a limited time to revive yourself and if you do, you will get your weapons/self revive back, if not, then you will die instantly but still keep your weapons only

data.name: shield/rampage_inducer_desc
data.value: Zombies are faster and more aggressive!

data.name: shield/round_music_desc
data.value: Randomizes the round ending/starting music or gameover to custom music.

data.name: shield/round_music_shadows_desc
data.value: Shadows Of Evil's round starting/ending music

data.name: shield/round_music_shadows_gameover_desc
data.value: Shadows Of Evil's Game Over music

data.name: shield/round_music_og_desc
data.value: Nacht der untoten's round starting/ending music

data.name: shield/round_music_og_gameover_desc
data.value: Nacht der untoten's Game Over music

data.name: shield/round_music_zet_desc
data.value: Zetsubou No Shima's round starting/ending music

data.name: shield/round_music_zet_gameover_desc
data.value: Zetsubou No Shima's Game Over music

data.name: shield/mainquest_continue
data.value: Continue game after Main Quest Completion

data.name: shield/mainquest_continue_desc
data.value: Gives you an option to continue the game after completing the main quest or just end the game. (only supports VOD/IX/BOTD for now)
